description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to run on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with both gcc and clang compilers. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11, install dependencies with pip and uv, install the package with ./install, and then run tests with ./test, adapting the command for clang and the test environment.
